name: sayhello
description: sayhello — before you say hello, know their story. A self-improving GTM harness that catches the agent lying.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter backend exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter frontend exec tsc --noEmit
